allow: Bash(ssh root@64.227.153.90 'cd /var/www/eloquent-backend && echo "=== branch/commit ==="; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git log --oneline -1; echo "=== status ==="; git status -sb 2>&1 | head; echo "=== php-fpm for api site ==="; grep -h "fastcgi_pass" /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/api.eloquent-backend 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh root@64.227.153.90 'cd /var/www/eloquent-backend && php artisan config:clear >/dev/null 2>&1; php artisan route:clear >/dev/null 2>&1; systemctl reload php8.3-fpm && echo "php-fpm reloaded" && systemctl is-active php8.3-fpm')
